description_long: This rifle features a futuristic, angular design with a predominantly metallic and camouflaged exterior. The body is robust, with a wide, armored receiver and two prominent, pronged foregrips extending downward, suggesting a heavy-duty or support weapon. The rear section includes a partially shielded area, possibly for operator protection, and a raised sight or targeting system mounted on top. The barrel is relatively short and thick, protruding from the front, and is accompanied by a visible muzzle device. The side panels and structural elements are reinforced, with some open framework sections, giving the weapon a mechanical, almost exoskeletal appearance. The overall construction suggests a blend of metal alloys and composite materials, designed for durability and urban combat scenarios.
description: A heavy, angular rifle with pronged foregrips, a short thick barrel, and a camouflaged, armored body featuring reinforced side panels and a raised sight.
description_view_0: Side view showing the pronged foregrips, armored receiver, and partially shielded rear section.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide stance of the pronged foregrips and the central barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view revealing the short barrel, camouflaged body, and structural framework.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the shielded back section and the angular, reinforced design.
